calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order For Allowance On Compensation Of Attorney For The Probate Estate
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Goodman for Hoa Nguyen.

Mr. Goodman stated that alot more work was done than what appeared on the record, that Mr. Van owned a cab company, that there were two properties in which the tenants stopped paying rent, that there was a lawsuit filed by one of the tenants and one of Mr. Van's former employee. In addition, he stated that he did quite a bit of work, that the other parts of the estate were done rather quickly and the estate would be ready to close. The Court denied the Petition for Allowance on Compenstation for Attorney without prejudice. Mr. Goodman will prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
